description: Trivial bug with clear repro steps. Default path: type=bug, priority=p2, effort=s, status=ready.

issue.title: [Bug] callGitHub does not retry on 502
issue.body:
## Steps to reproduce

1. Set `GITHUB_APP_ID` to a valid ID.
2. Call `callGitHub(ctx, "GET", "/repos/foo/bar")` against a repo whose App installation returns 502.
3. Observe: the call throws `GitHubApiError` immediately rather than retrying.

## Expected behavior

The call should retry on transient 5xx up to 3 times with exponential backoff (per the `octokit` plugin pattern).

## Actual behavior

Throws on the first 502. No retry, no backoff.

## Environment

- `agent/agent.ts` (M3)
- Node 24
- Windows 11 / pnpm 9

expected.rationale: Clear repro, scoped to one function, no info missing
